synthesis.driver: Escalating US-Iran strikes and Hormuz standoff push Brent higher, but oversupply caps gains.
synthesis.based_on: Trump says US will become ‘guardian’ of Strait of Hormuz and collect tolls

takes.trump says us will become guardian of st: US toll plan heightens geopolitical tension, supporting a modest war premium.
takes.tech stocks slide as oil climbs on hormu: Hormuz standoff fuels risk sentiment, lifting oil despite supply glut.
takes.oil rallies as conflict over hormuz esca: Fresh strikes escalate conflict, boosting war premium and oil prices.
takes.us and iran exchange missile and drone s: Missile and drone exchanges intensify risk, driving oil higher.
takes.us to take over strait of hormuz charge: US blockade threats amplify Hormuz risk, adding upward pressure to oil prices.
